title: bredemeyera praecelsa
intro: Bredemeyera praecelsa, a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, is native to Australia and is commonly known as the 'Coastal Bredemeyera' or 'Coastal Bredemei'. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of various skin conditions, including eczema, acne, and dermatitis, due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Bredemeyera praecelsa include its ability to soothe and calm irritated skin, reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. The herbal preparations of Bredemeyera praecelsa include infusions, decoctions, and topical creams, which are often used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
